description: Generate hero_front_straight from non-hero, non-target references only. Hero angles and side_right (mirror of side_left) are also forbidden.

success_criteria.secondary: final candidate gets B or better with no hard gates
success_criteria.tertiary: measurable improvement over best one-shot baseline
success_criteria.minimum: final remediation materially improves text/brand without structural regression

notes.side_right_excluded: side_right.jpg is a horizontal flip of side_left.jpg — not independent, excluded from both inputs and targets
